transcript.speaker: Vendor
transcript.text: We cannot move below the list price. It is a matter of principle for us at this stage of the quarter.

transcript.speaker: Buyer
transcript.text: Then we will have to shelve the rollout. We committed internally to a per-seat cost ceiling and I am not able to go above it.

transcript.speaker: Vendor
transcript.text: A pilot could be structured differently. Smaller footprint, executive visibility, an expansion option.

transcript.speaker: Buyer
transcript.text: Our board wants to see credible traction in this category before the next funding round.

inputs.question: Extract the underlying interests of each party, distinct from their stated positions. Interests are inferred; positions are stated.

primitives.label: protect quarterly revenue-recognition optics and precedent for enterprise deals
open a channel for future expansion revenue
credible category traction to support next funding round
honor internal commitment to per-seat cost discipline
